'''fabuvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:reactionarism|reactionarism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-b-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:reactionarism|reactionarism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fabuvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæbivith|fæbivith]] || [[word:fæbivij|fæbivij]] || [[word:fæbivish|fæbivish]] || [[word:fæbivi|fæbivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fabubuvuth|fabubuvuth]] || [[word:fabubuvuj|fabubuvuj]] || [[word:fabubuvush|fabubuvush]] || [[word:fabubuvu|fabubuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fabuvuth|fabuvuth]] || [[word:fabuvuj|fabuvuj]] || [[word:fabuvush|fabuvush]] || [[word:fabuvu|fabuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fabufvuth|fabufvuth]] || [[word:fabufvuj|fabufvuj]] || [[word:fabufvush|fabufvush]] || [[word:fabufvuf|fabufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fabuvuthu|fabuvuthu]] || [[word:fabuvuju|fabuvuju]] || [[word:fabuvushu|fabuvushu]] || [[word:fabuvuku|fabuvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fabuvuth|fabuvuth]] || [[word:fabuvuj|fabuvuj]] || [[word:fabuvush|fabuvush]] || [[word:fabuvu|fabuvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fabuvuthul|fabuvuthul]] || [[word:fabuvujul|fabuvujul]] || [[word:fabuvushul|fabuvushul]] || [[word:fabuvukul|fabuvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fabuvuthuthu|fabuvuthuthu]] || [[word:fabuvujuju|fabuvujuju]] || [[word:fabuvushushu|fabuvushushu]] || [[word:fabuvuku|fabuvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fabuvuthun|fabuvuthun]] || [[word:fabuvujun|fabuvujun]] || [[word:fabuvushun|fabuvushun]] || [[word:fabuvukun|fabuvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fabuvuthuoro|fabuvuthuoro]] || [[word:fabuvujuoro|fabuvujuoro]] || [[word:fabuvushuoro|fabuvushuoro]] || [[word:fabuvukuoro|fabuvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
